rationale: The previous attempt's two `assert forall` blocks for thread_perms and endpoint_perms hit trigger-ambiguity warnings/errors because Verus auto-picked `post1_self_.thread_perms@[t]` and `post2_self_.thread_perms@[t]` as separate (disjoint) triggers. I now annotate each `assert forall` with an explicit two-term `#![trigger post1...[k], post2...[k]]` and additionally re-assert the four ensures-foralls in the proof scope (Example 1 pattern) so z3 lines them up across both runs before lifting pointwise PointsTo equality to Map extensionality via `=~=`.
